projectsCards.label: Portfolio
projectsCards.title: mrahulrahi
projectsCards.para: The project is a personal portfolio website for front-end developer Rahul Maurya, built with Next.js. It features a modern and responsive design, showcasing various projects, skills, and tools. The site emphasizes user engagement through interactive elements and animations, providing a comprehensive overview of the developer's expertise and work.

projectsCards.label: Business
projectsCards.title: NTS
projectsCards.para: Welcome to Imagine Group, where your property dreams become reality. Our team of experienced professionals offers personalized service and innovative solutions to make your real estate journey seamless. Discover a world of possibilities with Imagine Group.

projectsCards.label: App & Web Design
projectsCards.title: SoulVerse
projectsCards.para: The project is a personal portfolio website for front-end developer Rahul Maurya, built with Next.js. It features a modern and responsive design, showcasing various projects, skills, and tools. The site emphasizes user engagement through interactive elements and animations, providing a comprehensive overview of the developer's expertise and work.

projectsCards.label: SliceMyPage
projectsCards.title: 80+ Projects Done
projectsCards.para: Delivered 50+ diverse projects on time and within budget. Proven expertise in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and web frameworks to create visually appealing and functional websites. Ensured project success through rigorous testing and quality assurance. Delivered high-quality, bug-free projects with optimal user experience and client satisfaction.

interest.title: Rahi Creations
interest.desc: My photography portfolio on GuruShots, where I share a curated selection of my finest visual explorations.

interest.title: FireLiquidator
interest.desc: A tech channel sharing unboxings, reviews, and insights on the latest gadgets.

hero.description: I craft beautiful and functional websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React — blending design precision with code clarity to build seamless user experiences.

about.name: Rahul Maurya
about.description: I am a front-end web developer whose life's passion is Technology and I also love to click photographs. I can provide clean code and pixel perfect design. I also make the website responsive & more interactive with web animations. I try to make videos that are to-the-point and as content-packed as possible, so if that sounds like your cup of tea, a sub would be massively appreciated! 🙏
